item.title: [Infraestrutura] Rapid7 Analysis: CVE-2020-3992 — ESXi OpenSLP remote code execution vulnerability - Rapid7
item.description:
🚨 Rapid7 Analysis: CVE-2020-3992 — ESXi OpenSLP remote code execution vulnerability - Rapid7
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2020-3992 associada a VMware. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-32711: Zero-Click 'EchoLeak' Vulnerability in Microsoft 365 Copilot Enables Stealth Data Exfiltration via Prompt Injection - Rescana

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8431-1: Ruby vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8431-1: Ruby vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Ruby's Net::IMAP library did not properly verify that Transport Layer Security (TLS) encryption was started after issuing a STARTTLS command. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform a machine-in-the-middle attack and silently bypass TLS encryption. (CVE-2026-42246) It was also discovered that Ruby's Net::IMAP library did not validate string arguments passed to certain command...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8431-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8430-1: ADSys vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8430-1: ADSys vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that ADSys did not properly handle certain HTTP/2 frames. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2026-27141) It was discovered that ADSys did not properly handle certain HTTP/2 SETTINGS frames. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8430-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-39468 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-39468 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.8
Resumo:
Contributor Arbitrary File Deletion in Meta Box – WordPress Custom Fields Framework <= 5.11.1 versions.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39468

item.title: [Segurança] CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Joomla JCE Flaw Allowing PHP Code Execution
item.description:
🚨 CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Joomla JCE Flaw Allowing PHP Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor (JCE) to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-48907 (CVSS score: 10.0), is a case of improper access control that could facilitate arbitrary
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisa-warns-of-actively-exploited-joomla.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] AI-Driven Exploits: What RabbitMQ Teaches Us About Unsupported OSS Risk
item.description:
💣 AI-Driven Exploits: What RabbitMQ Teaches Us About Unsupported OSS Risk
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The economics of enterprise cyber attacks have fundamentally shifted. For decades, the advantage in cybersecurity heavily favored the defender. It used to require highly specialized skills and a significant amount of time to discover zero-day vulnerabilities and write custom exploits that take into account complex enterprise architectures.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/ai-driven-exploits-what-rabbitmq-teaches-us-about-unsupported-oss-risk/

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to patch max severity Joomla plugin flaw by Friday
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to patch max severity Joomla plugin flaw by Friday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to patch a maximum-severity flaw in the Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor (JCE) plugin that is being actively exploited in the wild.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-max-severity-joomla-plugin-flaw-by-friday/

item.title: [Segurança] Google Vertex AI SDK Flaw Let Attackers Hijack Model Uploads via Bucket Squatting
item.description:
💣 Google Vertex AI SDK Flaw Let Attackers Hijack Model Uploads via Bucket Squatting
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A flaw in the Google Cloud Vertex AI SDK for Python let an attacker with no access to a victim's project hijack the victim's machine learning model upload and run code inside Google's serving infrastructure. Palo Alto Networks Unit 42, which found and reported the bug through Google's bug bounty program, calls the technique "Pickle in the Middle" and said it saw no exploitation in the wild.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/google-vertex-ai-sdk-flaw-let-attackers.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] The End of Database Silos: Consolidating Database Management on VMware Cloud Foundation
item.description:
📰 The End of Database Silos: Consolidating Database Management on VMware Cloud Foundation
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VMware Cloud Foundation & VMware Data Services Manager 9.1 For most enterprises, the database estate is one of the largest sources of avoidable cost and operational complexity. VMware Data Services Manager (DSM) 9.1 changes that equation. Broadcom | Private Cloud Infrastructure | June 2026 If you run a modern enterprise IT environment, you almost certainly …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/17/the-end-of-database-silos-consolidating-database-management-on-vmware-cloud-foundation/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Embracing Schema Drift: Seamless Parquet Querying in Tanzu Greenplum, No Matter How Your Data Changes
item.description:
📰 Embracing Schema Drift: Seamless Parquet Querying in Tanzu Greenplum, No Matter How Your Data Changes
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A data lake is a living archive and not a static snapshot. Files written in January rarely look like those written in December. As products evolve and businesses change, columns are inevitably added, renamed, dropped, and reordered. The critical question is: does your query engine evolve with them? Unlike traditional databases, data lakes lack a …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/embracing-schema-drift-seamless-parquet-querying-in-tanzu-greenplum-no-matter-how-your-data-changes/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VMware vSphere Configuration Profiles: A Comparison with VMware Host Profiles
item.description:
📰 VMware vSphere Configuration Profiles: A Comparison with VMware Host Profiles
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
vSphere Configuration Profiles, first introduced in VMware vSphere 8.0, allows VMware Cloud Foundation administrators to manage the ESX host configuration at a cluster level. In this article, we will discuss how this feature compares to Host Profiles, and how to transition from Host Profiles to vSphere Configuration Profiles in vSphere 9.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/16/vsphere-configuration-profiles-comparison/
